events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from UCSF Medical Center for client 1025. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular, diabetic, renal. Allergies: dairy. Sodium ceiling 550 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Filipino; dislikes cilantro, pork. Cooking ability: full. 10 meals/week, zone SoMa.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Lumpiang Sariwa
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Arroz Caldo
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 57 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Baked Bangus with Garlic Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 396/550 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 40–55) ✓, no dairy ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/550 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 40–55) ✓, no dairy ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Tinola with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 412/550 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 40–55) ✓, no dairy ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1025 added to route R-SOMA-1 (SoMa), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1025: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
